info.title: MailGlyph API
info.description: Email platform API for transactional emails, campaigns, and marketing automation

ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. **Secret keys (sk_*)** are required for all endpoints except `/v1/track`. **Public keys (pk_*)** only work with the `/v1/track` endpoint for client-side event tracking. Workspaces can have multiple active keys, and sender-domain operations enforce per-key domain scope when configured.

field.description: Field path to evaluate (for example: email, subscribed, data.plan, event.purchase).

value.description: Comparison value for operators that require it.

unit.description: Required for time-based operators such as within/olderThan/triggeredWithin/triggeredOlderThan.

FilterGroup.description: A group of filters that are combined with AND, with optional nested conditions.

FilterCondition.description: Root segment condition structure using logical groups.

VerificationCreditLedgerEntry.description: Append-only credit ledger entry. Email addresses are not returned in ledger responses.

seq.description: Monotonic ledger sequence number used for cursor pagination.

type.description: Ledger entry type. PURCHASE adds credits, CONSUME reserves/spends a credit for email validation, REFUND returns a credit for an Unknown result, and ADJUSTMENT is an administrative correction.

creditsDelta.description: Signed credit change for this entry. Purchases and refunds are positive; email validation consumption is negative.

balanceAfter.description: Project credit balance immediately after this ledger entry was written.

source.description: Origin of the ledger entry, such as single_api, single_tool, bulk, or stripe_checkout.

status.description: Validation status associated with the entry when available. Purchase entries usually have null status.

createdAt.description: Time when the ledger entry was created.

localEmailCount.description: Email count detected before validation processing.

reservedCredits.description: Credits currently reserved or finally used for this job.

creditUsed.description: Final billable credit count when completed.

lastValidationStatus.description: Latest validation processing status when available.

balance.description: Current email validation credit balance for this project.

lowCredits.description: Whether the current balance is low enough to require attention.

post.description: Send a transactional email via the public API. Automatically creates/updates contacts.

oneOf.description: Array of recipients (strings or objects), maximum 50 recipients

to.description: Recipient email(s). Can be a string, an object with {name, email}, or an array of either. Maximum 50 recipients per request.

body.description: Email body HTML (required if no template)

text.description:
The plain text version of the message.
If not provided, the `body` will be used to generate a plain text version. You can opt out of this behavior by setting value to an empty string.

template.description: Template ID to use for this email. When provided, uses the template's subject, body, from, and reply-to settings. You can override these by explicitly providing subject, body, from, or reply fields in the request. Template variables are populated from the data field.

oneOf.description: Sender as plain email or address string (e.g., "hello@example.com" or "My App <hello@example.com>")

from.description: Sender email address (requires verified domain). Required unless using a template that has a 'from' address configured. Can be a string (e.g., "hello@example.com" or "My App <hello@example.com>") or an object with {name, email} (e.g., {name: "My App", email: "hello@example.com"}).

name.description: Sender display name (alternative to using from.name)

subscribed.description: Whether recipient is subscribed to marketing emails. Defaults to false for transactional emails.

data.description: Optional template variables. Choose `Empty object` if you do not want to send any example preset keys.

oneOf.title: Example object
oneOf.description: Optional common keys. You can still add additional custom key/value pairs.

resetLink.description: Reset or action URL used in templates

oneOf.title: Empty object
oneOf.description: No preset keys. Add any custom key/value pairs as needed.

value.subject: Password Reset Request
value.body:
Reset Your Password

Click the link to reset: {{resetLink}}

Email with recipient and sender names.summary: Email with recipient and sender names

Using a template.description: Send email using a template. Provide the template ID and any data for template variables. The template's subject, body, from address, and reply-to will be used automatically.

Using template with overrides.description: You can override template values by providing subject, body, from, or reply fields. This example overrides the template's subject line.

email.description: MailGlyph email record ID. Use this to correlate webhook events (included as 'emailId' in event payload data) with your send requests.

post.description: Track an event for a contact. Automatically creates/updates the contact.

subscribed.description: Whether contact is subscribed to marketing emails. Defaults to true for event tracking.

data.description: Optional event data and contact metadata. Choose `Empty object` if you do not want to send any example preset keys.

oneOf.title: Example object
oneOf.description: Optional common event keys. You can still add additional custom key/value pairs.

oneOf.title: Empty object
oneOf.description: No preset keys. Add any custom key/value pairs as needed.

post.description: Validate an email address, run SMTP deliverability validation when available, check disposable and personal domains, verify MX records, detect random string patterns, and detect potential typos with suggestions.

valid.description: Whether the email appears to be valid overall

validationMethod.description: Validation method used for this result. smtp means mailbox-level SMTP validation was attempted.

smtpStatus.description: Mailbox-level SMTP validation status when SMTP validation is available.

smtpDiagnosis.description: Human-readable SMTP validation diagnosis when available.

isDisposable.description: Whether the email is from a disposable/temporary email domain

isAlias.description: Whether the email is from a forwarding/alias service

isTypo.description: Whether a potential typo was detected in the email address

isPlusAddressed.description: Whether the email uses plus addressing (contains a + in the local part)

isRandomInput.description: Whether the local-part appears randomly generated (token/UUID-like patterns)

isPersonalEmail.description: Whether the email is from a personal/free email provider (Gmail, Hotmail, Yahoo, etc.)

isCatchAll.description: Whether SMTP validation detected a catch-all domain where the exact mailbox cannot be fully verified

isGreylisted.description: Whether SMTP validation was temporarily deferred by greylisting

domainExists.description: Whether the domain exists in DNS (has NS records)

hasWebsite.description: Whether the domain has a website (has DNS A or AAAA records) - informational only

hasMxRecords.description: Whether the domain has MX records configured for email delivery

suggestedEmail.description: Suggested correction if a typo was detected (optional)

reasons.description: Array of human-readable reasons describing the validation results

creditsConsumed.description: Net email validation credits consumed by this request. Valid, Invalid, Catch All, and Grey-listed results consume 1 credit. Unknown results consume 0 credits after automatic refund.

data.smtpDiagnosis: Mailbox exists and can receive mail.
The mailbox could not be confirmed.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

402.description: The project does not have an available email validation credit.

error.message: Email validation credits are required to validate email addresses.

get.description: Get a paginated list of contacts with cursor-based pagination

total.description: Total count (only included on first page)

post.description: Create a new contact or update existing (upsert by email)

data.description: Optional custom contact data fields. Choose `Empty object` if you do not want to send any example preset keys.

oneOf.title: Example object
oneOf.description: Optional common keys. You can still add additional custom key/value pairs.

oneOf.title: Empty object
oneOf.description: No preset keys. Add any custom key/value pairs as needed.

get.description: Get a single contact by ID

data.description: Optional custom contact data fields. Choose `Empty object` if you do not want to send any example preset keys.

oneOf.title: Example object
oneOf.description: Optional common keys. You can still add additional custom key/value pairs.

oneOf.title: Empty object
oneOf.description: No preset keys. Add any custom key/value pairs as needed.

get.description: Get a paginated list of email templates
Get a specific template by ID
Get a paginated list of email campaigns

from.description: Sender email address (must be from verified domain)

segmentId.description: Segment ID (required if audienceType is SEGMENT)

post.description: Send a campaign immediately or schedule for future delivery

scheduledFor.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when to send the campaign. Omit or set to null for immediate send.

trackMembership.description: Track segment membership changes over time
Track segment membership changes over time

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by workflow name or description

post.description: Add contacts to a static segment by email

delete.description: Remove contacts from a static segment by email

get.description: Returns the current email validation credit balance for the project attached to the secret API key.

200.description: Current project email validation credit balance

data.description: Current public credit balance summary for the API key project.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

get.summary: List email validation credit ledger entries
get.description: Returns recent credit ledger entries for the project attached to the secret API key. Raw email addresses are never returned.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of ledger entries to return. Values are clamped between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor returned by the previous page.

items.description: Ledger entries ordered from newest to oldest. Entries do not include raw email addresses.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page. Omitted or null when there are no more entries.

data.description: A page of email validation credit ledger entries and the cursor for the next page.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

post.description: Upload a TXT, CSV, or XLSX file up to 90MB for bulk email validation. Credits are reserved from the detected email count, then reconciled as processing progresses.

file.description: TXT, CSV, or XLSX email list file.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

get.description: List recent bulk email validation jobs for the project attached to the secret API key.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key
Invalid or missing secret API key

delete.description: Delete a bulk email validation job when it is not actively uploading or processing. If the file was not submitted for processing, reserved credits are refunded.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

post.description: Continue a queued or action-required bulk validation job after credits are available.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

get.description: Download completed validation results. Filtered downloads are CSV only; XLS is supported only for all results.

401.description: Invalid or missing secret API key

tags.name: Public API
tags.description: Public API endpoints for sending emails and tracking events
